stakeholders.Stakeholder Name: Hong Kong Polytechnic University Consulting Team
stakeholders.Role: Conducts consultancy study on needs and support for carers of elderly persons and persons with disabilities
Commissioned the consultancy study on carer support
Formulated the Elderly Service Programme Plan in 2017
Responsible for implementing policies related to welfare and support services for elderly persons and persons with disabilities
Provide additional support services and aid to caregivers
Provides resource and support centre for carers
Offers community support and resources for caregivers
Provides financial assistance to low-income families with persons with disabilities
Provide care and support services to clients and their families
Facilitates social enterprises or NGOs to help carers build strengths and provides services and support.
Oversees various social services and assists in implementing carer support initiatives.
Collaborate with the government to provide community-based services and support for carers.
Primary individuals providing care for elderly persons and persons with disabilities.
Provide services and resources to support carers in building their competencies.
Oversees policies and procedures for handling elder abuse cases
Investigates suspected elder abuse cases and enforces laws
Provides medical examination and treatment for suspected elder abuse cases

stakeholders.Stakeholder Name: Crisis Intervention and Support Center (Tung Wah Group of Hospitals)
stakeholders.Role: Offers comprehensive assistance to elderly victims of abuse

stakeholders.Stakeholder Name: Society for the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals
stakeholders.Canonical Name: Society for the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals
stakeholders.Role: Advocates for the protection and welfare of vulnerable populations including the elderly
Introduced measures to require companies to extend retirement age limits and provide incentives for elderly employment
Enacted the Employment Measure Act to prohibit age discrimination and raised pensionable age
Provides financial incentives and sets minimum retirement age for re-employment of older workers
Published economic letters analyzing elderly employment trends and policies
Promotes compliance with the Age Discrimination in Employment Act in the US
Raised the retirement age for new recruits to provide job opportunities for older workers
Offers training allowances and employment support programs for elderly job seekers
Provides training courses and placement services for mature persons
